markdownRemark.html:
About Me

I’m Valentin Knabel, vknabel on [GitHub](https://github.com/vknabel) and on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/vknabel), and live in Ulm, Germany. I work at the startup [Conclurer](https://conclurer.com) mostly doing web apps in Vue.js, Ionic and Angular. In my free time I prefer to write dev tools using Swift Package Manager. Now I mostly try to improve VS Code’s support for Swift.

My most important projects:

  • Archery allows you to declare all your project's metadata and what you can do with it in one single place.
  • Maintained Swift Development Environment (SDE) provides Swift autocompletion to VS Code on macOS and Linux.
  • SwiftFormat for VS Code: a plugin for SwiftFormat on macOS.
